allow_instructions: Read-only git (status, diff, log, fetch, branch) is always fine.
Running pytest, ruff, mkdocs build, and bootstrap_venv in this repo is fine.
Commit and push on feature branches for jlillywh/SHRINE is fine when the user asked for a commit or PR.
block_instructions: Ask before git push --force, git reset --hard, git clean, or any destructive git.
Ask before npm publish / twine upload / PyPI release unless the user explicitly requested a release.
